---
name: Bug report
description: Report something broken or unreliable
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: ["bug", "ai-task"]
---

## What Is Broken?
Describe the problem clearly.

## Expected Behaviour
What should happen?

## Actual Behaviour
What happens instead?

## Steps To Reproduce
1. Go to...
2. Click...
3. See...

## Affected Area
Route/page/API/component:

## Severity
- [ ] Blocking live usage
- [ ] Breaks admin/reports/dashboard
- [ ] Breaks public submission flow
- [ ] Visual/UI issue
- [ ] Minor issue

## Screenshots / Logs
Paste screenshots or relevant logs. Do not paste secrets.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Root cause identified
- [ ] Smallest safe fix applied
- [ ] Main affected flow tested
- [ ] No unrelated refactor included

## Testing Required
- [ ] Build passes
- [ ] Relevant route/API tested
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] Security/admin behavior unchanged
